values.description: Base URL of the SoulBuddy backend. Change to http://localhost:9000 if BACKEND_PORT was overridden.
Supabase JWT for cognito requests. Obtain via Supabase Auth sign-in (e.g. supabase.auth.signInWithPassword). Required only for is_incognito=false requests.
UUID of an existing conversation. Copy from a previous /chat response to continue the same session.
